title: roettlera beccarii
intro: Roettlera beccarii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Rubiaceae family which includes coffee and gardenia. Roettlera beccarii is also known as the Beccari's Roettlera or Roettlera Beccarii, which is native to New Guinea. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. Roettlera beccarii is often prepared in herbal teas and infusions, and has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive discomfort, and promoting immune system function.
